name: agentbridge
description: Bridge between Claude Code and Codex — bidirectional agent communication via MCP Channel + JSON-RPC

scripts.build:plugin: mkdir -p plugins/agentbridge/server && bun build src/bridge.ts --outfile plugins/agentbridge/server/bridge-server.js --target bun && bun build src/daemon.ts --outfile plugins/agentbridge/server/daemon.js --target bun
scripts.validate:plugin: claude plugin validate plugins/agentbridge && claude plugin validate .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && bun test src && bun run build:plugin && bun scripts/check-plugin-versions.js

author: AgentBridge Contributors
